title: Pan-Seared Monkfish with Sweet and Sour Glaze
description: A sweet and sour glaze complements the delicate flavor of monkfish in this Asian-inspired dish.
instructions: 2. Season the monkfish fillets with salt.
3. In a small saucepan, heat the mildly flavored oil over medium heat.
4. Add the garlic and ginger to the oil and sauté for 1 minute.
5. Stir in the sour plum sauce and honey to create the sweet and sour glaze.
6. Pan-sear the monkfish fillets in the oil for 2-3 minutes on each side.
7. Transfer the monkfish to a baking dish and brush with the sweet and sour glaze.
8. Bake in the preheated oven for 8-10 minutes, or until cooked through.
9. Serve immediately, garnished with chopped green onions if desired.
